title: 60-Second History: 1950 → ChatGPT
concept: AI isn't new — the idea is over 70 years old. What changed recently is data and computing power.

exercises.prompt: Recap: what kind of AI exists today?

options.text: Narrow AI — great at specific tasks
General AI that can do anything

exercises.explain: Right — everything today is Narrow AI. General AI doesn't exist yet.

cards.title: AI is older than you think
cards.body: The dream of thinking machines started in the 1950s — not in 2022. What you see today is the payoff of a 70-year journey.

cards.title: 1950 — The Turing Test
cards.body: Alan Turing asks "Can machines think?" and proposes a test: if you can't tell a machine from a human in conversation, call it intelligent.

cards.title: 1997 — Deep Blue beats Kasparov
cards.body: IBM's chess computer beat the reigning world champion — proof a machine could out-think humans at a narrow task.

cards.title: 2012 — Deep learning erupts
cards.body: A neural network (AlexNet) crushed an image-recognition contest. Data + GPUs lit the fuse on the modern AI boom.

cards.title: 2022 — ChatGPT
cards.body: A chatbot anyone could talk to reached 100 million users in 2 months — the fastest-adopted app in history.

cards.title: Why the boom now?
cards.body: AI didn't suddenly appear — three things finally lined up:

exercises.prompt: Roughly when did the idea of "thinking machines" begin?
exercises.explain: Turing and others were exploring machine intelligence in the 1950s — AI has a 70-year history.

exercises.prompt: What did IBM's Deep Blue famously do in 1997?

options.text: Drove a car across the US

exercises.explain: Deep Blue beat world champion Garry Kasparov — a landmark for narrow AI.

exercises.prompt: True or false: AI was invented in 2022 when ChatGPT launched.
exercises.explain: False — the idea dates to the 1950s. ChatGPT made AI famous, but didn't invent it.

exercises.sentence: The 2012 boom came from deep ___ networks.
exercises.explain: Deep neural networks, plus lots of data and GPUs, powered the modern surge.

exercises.prompt: A friend says: "AI is brand new — it just appeared with ChatGPT." Best response?

options.text: "Actually the idea goes back to the 1950s — recent data and computing power made it explode."

exercises.explain: Exactly — AI had a 70-year runway. ChatGPT is the visible tip of decades of research meeting cheap data and GPUs.
